textByHashes.0832ebc0be0ba8589f59a7eeda91e4706ba96639: Oh! Please hire me, sir! I'm very good, well, I'm not bad, and my fee's only 1000 coins.
textByHashes.c374f10a7b880b3add6b961fef001a12b967b1bc: Oh! Please hire me, madam! I'm very good, well, I'm not bad, and my fee's only 1000 coins.
textByHashes.217d04ad9d67a14e4f6832c5632c4fc4d7efe772: Well, I can, um. I can cook meals and make tea and everything, and I can even take things to and from the bank for you. I won't make any mistakes this time and everything will be fine!
textByHashes.b89c352280000d46e01fb9c2f42c193cf034d913: Oh! Oh! I, well, I, er. It wasn't really my fault, I mean, it was, but not really. I mean, how was I to know that that plate was so valuable? It was just lying around and I don't know art, it just looked like a pretty pattern and
textByHashes.a4bdfd171977a468b4b9fdb5be35e3221c7150a5: I just had to use it because there weren't enough plates. And no one had told me that Dennis was off sick and hadn't fed the dogs so I wasn't expecting them to jump up at me when I was carrying the food and it, it
textByHashes.5afe1bc117ca1d111980797e287c2f2c8c62d343: went all over the place, gravy and potatoes and bits of fine porcelain and I'm so sorry. It won't happen again, I promise.
textByHashes.fce6136ad1dd23868cdad85ad3d614d5b73c49d7: Oh! Oh dear! I'm terribly sorry, sir, but I'm not allowed to work for anyone unless they have level 25 Construction. If a house is poorly made I might damage it by mistake!
textByHashes.fa1208c75074a04387f8354ff156f4165e0e5256: Oh! Oh dear! I'm terribly sorry, madam, but I'm not allowed to work for anyone unless they have level 25 Construction. If a house is poorly made I might damage it by mistake!
textByHashes.a73b35215b60c51519c02b4286221821ca5fca78: Oh... I'm terribly sorry, sir, but I'd really prefer to be paid before I start work.
textByHashes.4169effa6afa31ff220c61d9f78c841028a71014: Oh... I'm terribly sorry, madam, but I'd really prefer to be paid before I start work.
textByHashes.8e88f9c90cea31b4d8621f9c5f357a1011b3e223: Oh! Oh, thank you sir, thank you!
textByHashes.0128a73a7c73dd0c010155e0fa72e859d621c28d: Oh! Oh, thank you madam, thank you!
